title: Crispy Earthy Broad Beans Stir-fry
description: A festive Spanish dish featuring broad beans stir-fried with a touch of earthiness and crispy texture, perfect for a healthy snack or light meal, gluten-free and paleo-friendly.
instructions: Wash the broad beans and remove any damaged parts.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet or wok over medium heat. Add red pepper flakes, garlic cloves, and a pinch of salt.
Add the washed broad beans to the skillet and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until they start to crisp up and turn golden brown.
Drizzle lemon juice over the beans and continue cooking for another minute until most of the liquid evaporates.
Season with sea salt and black pepper according to taste. Stir well to distribute the flavors evenly.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal accompaniment.
